title: Magi: The Labyrinth of Magic
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (25) + The Kingdom of Magic / S2 (25, cumulative eps 26-50) = 50 total. Manga complete at 369 chapters; anime covers up to ch 198. Chapters 199-369 (Second Balbadd, Alma Torran, Kou Empire, Final Arc) are unadapted. Sinbad no Bouken is a separate prequel franchise.

mappings.arc: Second Balbadd / Alma Torran / Kou Empire / Final Arc (unadapted)
